creator: george@m5p.com
text: Having just now recovered from the trauma--whoops, I mean exercise--of fixing for CVE-2024-5274 (with the ad-hoc patch, which worked fine), I'll install the new chromium on my vast local network (has four machines) before I try dealing with the upstreamable fix.  But my sincere thanks to all who help maintain chromium on FreeBSD!  (One thousand two hundred and ninety-two patch files??  Bravo!)
